headline: 4 Dividend Stocks to Double Up on Right Now
summary: Energy Transfer, Enbridge, Duke Energy, and NextEra Energy are all positioned to meet increasing power demands and pay shareholders respectable dividends in the process.

headline: NextEra Energy: The Utility Built For The Data Center Power Crunch
summary: Strong Buy case for NextEra Energy (NEE): AI-driven power demand, 33 GW backlog, and a $150 target. Read here for a detailed analysis.
